{{see
| name=Old Town Square
| address=Central district
| content=A compact landmark square with historic buildings, cafés, and evening atmosphere.
}}
{{do|name=River Walk|content=Follow the waterfront path for city views and a low-pressure orientation route.}}
{{eat|name=Central Market Hall|content=Busy local food stalls and regional dishes.|address=Market Street}}
{{buy|name=Design Arcade|content=Independent boutiques, books, and local gifts.|address=Creative Quarter}}
